description: Aggregated accuracy tracking across all prediction tiers. Updated after each prediction is scored. L1 = overall counts, L2 = RCA patterns, L3 = trend over time + factor performance.

L2_rca_log.root_cause_summary: Geopolitical binary resolution (ceasefire deal) overrode technical setup. SWIGGY's bearish technical thesis was overwhelmed by regime shift from DEADLINE_EVE_BINARY to DE-ESCALATION_REAL.
L2_rca_log.missing_signal: FORECAST_PAT003 — geopolitical binary underweighting. Deal scenario was assigned 20% probability, materialized at 100%.
L2_rca_log.factor_gap: No reversal trigger framework for 3-outcome geopolitical binaries
L2_rca_log.lesson: For predictions made ahead of geopolitical binary events with 3+ outcomes, ALWAYS model reversal triggers. 'If deal → +2-4% Nifty, tech/consumer names bounce regardless of individual thesis.'

L2_rca_log.root_cause_summary: Defense sector duration premium thesis (M012) not in framework. 2-week ceasefire is OPTIMAL for defense stocks — extended tension without immediate peace = maximum war premium duration.
L2_rca_log.missing_signal: M012_DEFENSE_SECTOR_DURATION_PREMIUM — war premium peaks at 2-6 week managed tension, not immediate strikes or instant peace.
L2_rca_log.factor_gap: Framework lacked duration-modeling for defense stocks in ceasefire scenarios
L2_rca_log.lesson: Before making bearish defense predictions, check: what is the duration of the tension scenario? 2-6 week managed tension = hold or add defense. Instant peace = sell defense. Acute escalation = defense spikes but reverses quickly.

L2_rca_log.root_cause_summary: Ceasefire fragility underestimated. April 8 ceasefire failed within 3 days (Islamabad talks April 11). War premium reversed direction.
L2_rca_log.missing_signal: FORECAST_PAT004 (Ceasefire Stability Precondition) — need 3+ day stability before making bearish safe-haven calls.
L2_rca_log.factor_gap: No ceasefire hold probability decay model in framework
L2_rca_log.lesson: Wait 3+ trading days before bearish safe-haven calls on ceasefire. Model ceasefire failure probability at 40-60% for first 72 hours.

L2_rca_log.root_cause_summary: 2nd MACRO_REGIME_OVERRIDE for IT. M013 at 2 occurrences — candidate for promotion.
L2_rca_log.factor_gap: Auto-cap IT confidence at 2★ during blockade
L2_rca_log.lesson: IT predictions fail during active geopolitical crises regardless of earnings quality. 2 confirmations.

L2_rca_log.root_cause_summary: MACRO_REGIME_OVERRIDE (3rd occurrence). IT sector weakness + sell-on-news persistence. TCS +0.18% on Nifty +0.65% day.
L2_rca_log.lesson: Halt TCS short-horizon reversion calls until IT sector regime resets.

L2_rca_log.root_cause_summary: DIPLOMATIC_RESTART_NOT_ANTICIPATED (2nd occurrence). Gold bid collapsed as Trump reversed stance on Iran talks. Brent -6% from peak. SETFGOLD ₹128.69 vs ₹130-134 target.
L2_rca_log.lesson: Safe-haven thesis after talks failure must auto-invalidate within 48h if diplomatic reversal signal emerges.

L2_rca_log.root_cause_summary: Defense stock non-linear breakout on regime change. Target range 1050-1100 was correct directionally but too conservative for ceasefire-collapse acceleration.
L2_rca_log.missing_signal: REGIME_BREAKOUT_MULTIPLIER — in GEOPOLITICAL_RISK_ELEVATED_CEASEFIRE_COLLAPSE, defense stocks can exceed 'fundamental' war-premium levels by 10-20% on momentum
L2_rca_log.factor_gap: No defense range multiplier for regime-breakout scenarios vs fragile-ceasefire scenarios
L2_rca_log.lesson: In ceasefire collapse (vs fragile ceasefire), defense targets should add +15-20% buffer. P025 directional thesis was right but range too conservative. Count: 1 occurrence (observe).

monthly_accuracy.notes: Added P022 WRONG (TCS), P023 WRONG (SETFGOLD) to this week's total. April 8: P007/P009 WRONG. April 14: P012 PARTIAL, P013 WRONG. April 15: P015 RIGHT, P016 PARTIAL, P018 WRONG, P019 RIGHT, P020 WRONG. April 16: P024 WRONG. April 17: P022 WRONG, P023 WRONG. Framework v4: M013+FORECAST_PAT005+SELL_ON_EARNINGS_NEWS_IT promoted.

L3_trend.improvement_signal: SYSTEMATIC_FAILURE_DETECTED — Diplomatic Restart Speed. All 5 most recent predictions failed due to underestimating how quickly Trump/US pivots to diplomatic restart after talks failure. FORECAST_PAT005 now promoted to framework. Expected recovery: predictions that directly track ceasefire resolution (P027 Nifty rally, P030 Astra Micro correction) are better structured with explicit auto-invalidation clauses. Framework v4 changes should improve accuracy in week ahead.

key_failure_patterns.DIPLOMATIC_RESTART_SPEED: 3/5 wrong predictions (P022, P023, P024) failed because diplomatic restart after Islamabad failure was faster than model assumed. Now codified in FORECAST_PAT005.
key_failure_patterns.IT_MACRO_REGIME_OVERRIDE: 3 consecutive TCS predictions (P018, P021, P022) WRONG. M013 now promoted. No more short-horizon IT bullish calls during active geopolitical regimes.
key_failure_patterns.GOLD_REGIME_SENSITIVITY: 2/2 SETFGOLD predictions WRONG. Both failed due to rapid diplomatic shifts (one ceasefire fragility, one diplomatic restart). Low confidence (2*) on all future gold directional calls in volatile regimes.

what_works.DIRECT_BENEFICIARY_CALLS: P019 Adani Ports RIGHT (direct Hormuz beneficiary). P015 IndiGo RIGHT (direct ATF relief beneficiary). P008 Nifty RIGHT (clear DII-support thesis).
what_works.LESSON: Predictions that have a SINGLE, DIRECT causal link between catalyst and stock perform best. Complex multi-factor predictions with diplomatic/regime assumptions fail systematically in volatile geopolitical environments.

framework_evolution_log_update.changes: PROMOTED: M013 (IT Regime Risk Filter — 3 occurrences), FORECAST_PAT005 (Diplomatic Restart Trigger — 2 occurrences), SELL_ON_EARNINGS_NEWS_IT (3 occurrences). AMENDED: TALKS_FAILED_WAR_PREMIUM_RETURN — duration constraint added (1-2 day pattern only, not suitable for 7D+ predictions). Added P027-P030 new predictions with explicit auto-invalidation clauses.

M001.note: Brent now $93.13. M001 regime has CHANGED — now crude-bullish for downstream (MRPL, airlines) rather than crude-bearish for these stocks.

M003.accuracy_contribution: NEUTRAL — directionally correct on P008 (DII support held), mixed on P007 (FII flows less relevant when macro regime shifts).

FORECAST_PAT003.name: Geopolitical Binary Underweighting
FORECAST_PAT003.accuracy_contribution: CRITICAL GAP — promoted to framework April 8. Must apply reversal triggers in all 3-outcome geopolitical binary scenarios.

M012.name: Defense Sector Duration Premium
M012.accuracy_contribution: CRITICAL GAP — promoted to framework April 8. 2-6 week managed tension = maximum defense premium. Must model ceasefire duration when analyzing defense stocks.

framework_evolution_log.description: Signal framework initialized with 9 macro, 9 sector, 6 technical factors
Added FORECAST_PAT003 (Geopolitical Binary Underweighting) and M012 (Defense Sector Duration Premium) to framework. Both promoted after 2 confirmed occurrences each.
framework_evolution_log.triggered_by: RCA001 (P007 WRONG) + RCA002 (P009 WRONG) — both caused by April 8 ceasefire regime shift
key_learnings: Geopolitical binaries with 3+ outcomes always have a best-case scenario that markets price faster than consensus
Defense stocks thrive in 2-6 week managed tension, not instant peace or acute escalation
RBI/central bank calendar check needed on binary event forecast days
Regime changes are binary, not incremental — a single diplomatic breakthrough can override 3 days of fear premium

framework_evolution_log.description: Added FORECAST_PAT004 (Ceasefire Stability Precondition). IT regime risk filter (M013) identified — 2 more occurrences needed for promotion.
framework_evolution_log.triggered_by: RCA004 (P020 SETFGOLD WRONG) — 2nd ceasefire fragility observation
key_learnings: Ceasefire stability requires 3+ day confirmation window before bearish safe-haven calls
IT stocks face macro regime override in BLOCKADE_ESCALATION — do not predict breakouts during active crises
Aviation benefits non-linearly from Brent decline (₹200-300 per $10 Brent drop for INDIGO)
Direct geopolitical beneficiaries (ADANI PORT/Hormuz) are more reliable than indirect (TCS/IT)

session_log.actual: DOWN -0.93% (close 23,775.10) — 25 pts BELOW range lower bound
session_log.root_cause: Trump statement on Iran 'remains tense until real pact reached' dampened post-ceasefire optimism more than expected. Bloomberg noted India rally showed 'signs of short covering, lacks fresh buying'. TCS Q4 results announced post-market (positive) but not tradeable on April 9. Error magnitude: -0.73% vs forecast (close was 25 pts below lower bound).

session_log.forecast: BINARY_VOLATILE_TILTED_BEARISH (20/45/35 bull/base/bear) — Islamabad talks + TCS gap-up
session_log.actual: Nifty closed ~24,050 (+1.16% from 23,775). TALKS_NEUTRAL confirmed. TCS sell-on-news ₹2,539.80. Brent $95.95 (intraday dip to $91-93 on Trump delay). Sensex +900 pts.
session_log.notes: Base scenario (TALKS_NEUTRAL) materialized. Nifty slightly above base range (23,700-24,000 forecast, actual 24,050). Direction correct — recovery, not WAR_PREMIUM_RETURN. Brent intraday surprise (Trump April 22 delay) added upside beyond base model.

session_log.actual: Islamabad talks ended with NO DEAL after 21 hours (Vance left without agreement). US Navy entered Strait of Hormuz for mine-clearing. Iran IRGC: 'This is the last warning.' Ceasefire still technically holding per Pakistan FM.
session_log.notes: Weekend event significantly changes outlook for April 14 open. War premium likely to return Monday. Brent expected to spike from $95.95 toward $100+. Impact: defense stocks bullish, gold bullish, aviation/ports bearish, IT neutral, Nifty likely gap-down.
Direction correct but magnitude underestimated. Market held better than expected due to intraday support. Opening bias accurate (GAP_DOWN).

session_log.root_cause: Iran-US talk imminence + Brent declining drove relief rally beyond forecast range. 30% probability relief scenario materialized fully.
session_log.notes: Opening bias also WRONG (GAP_DOWN -0.8% forecast, GAP_UP +1.08% actual). Double miss on both bias and direction magnitude.

session_log.root_cause: Intraday reversal — opened strong but profit-booking + Iran counter-threats (Gulf/Red Sea shipping) + Friday risk-off erased gains. Heavyweight banks dragged (HDFC -1.78%). Close was within range but direction wrong.
session_log.notes: Opening bias CORRECT (gap-down). Session direction PARTIAL (in range, direction wrong).

Direction correct (bearish), in range (24,173 within 24,100-24,580), Brent in forecast range ($97.76 in $92-98). Magnitude ~4.2x off (-0.84% vs -0.2%) — HCLTECH post-market -10% guidance miss and Infosys FY27 CC in-line guidance (1.5-3.5%) triggered SELL_ON_EARNINGS_NEWS_IT (M013 5th confirmation). BankNifty -1.43% signalled broad risk-off in financials.

weekly_review_2026_04_12.note: No predictions reached check_date during April 7-11 trading week. All scoring (P012, P013, P015, P016, P018, P019, P020, P021, P022) deferred to April 14-17 EOD runs.
